## Problem statement

What gap does this close? What is the current pain (concrete: an error you see, a workaround you wrote, a metric you can't get)?

## Proposed surface

A sketch of the API or behavior. Code preferred over prose:

```python
# What you imagine calling
```

## Why this belongs in embspec

embspec is a focused library for embedding-pipeline ops + drift detection (see `CONTRIBUTING.md` for scope). Explain why this should live here rather than in a RAG framework, a vector DB client, or a separate library.

## Alternatives considered

What else have you tried or considered? (Custom code? Different lib? Doing nothing?)

## Willing to contribute?

- [ ] I can open a PR for this
- [ ] I can help test it
- [ ] Looking for someone else to build it
